ideation: This animation sequence will depict the robot offering a red envelope, symbolizing gifting or celebration. The movement will be primarily focused on the right arm, extending forward to present the envelope, while the left arm remains in a more passive, resting position. The robot's posture will be polite and slightly formal to reflect the significance of the gift. Frame 1 will show both arms at rest, with the right arm slightly angled outward and downward in anticipation. Frame 2 will have the right arm extending forward and slightly downward, with the wrist slightly tilted so that the hand is open as if presenting the red envelope. Frame 3 will have the right arm maintaining the extended position, but with a slight pause, holding the offering. Frame 4 will have the right arm returning to the rest position. Frame 5 will have the robot resuming the initial relaxed neutral position, completing the gesture.

frames.beat: both arms rest, right arm angled slightly out
right arm extends forward to offer the gift
holding the offering steady for a moment
right arm begins to return to the side
both arms return to a relaxed neutral pose
